project_type: AWS CDK TypeScript infrastructure project with Lambda function
build_system: npm + tsc. Lambda is deployed using Code.fromAsset('lambda/audio-processor') - raw TS that gets compiled at deploy time. No bundling (no esbuild/webpack). Node.js 22.x runtime provides AWS SDK v3 at runtime.
test_framework: Jest with ts-jest transform. Tests in test/ directory matching **/*.test.ts. Uses aws-cdk-lib/assertions Template for CDK tests. Snapshot test exists in test/__snapshots__/cdk-base.test.ts.snap.
verification_instructions: 1. Run `unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx jest --passWithNoTests` - all tests pass. 2. Run `unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx cdk synth` - synthesizes without errors. 3. Run `unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx tsc --noEmit` - no type errors.
snapshot_or_generated_files: test/__snapshots__/cdk-base.test.ts.snap - regenerated by running `unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx jest -u`
setup_instructions: Run `cd /projects/sandbox/cdk-sleep-ts-kiro && unset NODE_OPTIONS && npm ci` to install dependencies. AWS SDK v3 packages need to be added as devDependencies for Lambda unit tests (mocking). At runtime on Node.js 22.x, AWS SDK v3 is included by the Lambda runtime.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network - can access npm registry. Must prefix all npm/npx/tsc/jest commands with `unset NODE_OPTIONS &&` due to sandbox proxy preload issue. No Docker daemon available.
contribution_requirements: Strict TDD: write failing tests first, then implement. Use conventional commits. Update ARCHITECTURE.md after changes. Maintain least-privilege IAM.
key_patterns: CDK stack in lib/cdk-base-stack.ts. Lambda code in lambda/audio-processor/index.ts (single file, no package.json). CDK tests in test/cdk-base.test.ts use Template assertions. State machine flow: WriteMetadata -> Validate Input -> Process Audio (Lambda) -> Synthesize Speech (Polly) -> Update Status -> Notify Success. Lambda currently has TABLE_NAME, INPUT_BUCKET_NAME, OUTPUT_BUCKET_NAME env vars. Lambda has DynamoDB read/write access only - needs S3 read (input) and write (output) permissions added.
directory_structure: Root: CDK app. lib/ = CDK stacks. lambda/audio-processor/ = Lambda handler (single index.ts file, no local package.json). test/ = Jest tests for CDK stacks. test/__snapshots__/ = Jest snapshot file.
